Sources.Title: Is Function Health Blood Testing Worth the $500? My Honest Review!

TranscriptionNotes: The subject-published follow-up states that the retest was on 13 May, and the visible application labels the results as tested in May 2025 with a clinician note dated 19 May 2025; the stored measurement date is therefore 13 May 2025.

The subject directly states that she is 35 while discussing the May 2025 biological-age result. AgeYears is that stated chronological age; the application's proprietary biological-age result was not used.
All nine stored biomarkers are visibly reported while the subject scrolls the current results from the same May 2025 retest.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
